content: We can construct a hierarchical iterative self-refinement framework for software test case suites, where each leaf test case uses Self-Refine to iteratively optimize its own validity and coverage independently, then feeds refined output up to its parent test grouping via an AddParent-style hierarchical assembly mechanism to refine the entire test suite structure incrementally. This framework eliminates the need for manually labeled test improvement training data or external test oracle dependencies for both individual test cases and top-level test suite design.
